Header.title: Nyumbani
Header.paragraph: Appartment management system for Landlords and Tenants.

About.paragraph: We are a versitile company based in Nairobi Kenya and we offer support services to apartments needing our services as Landlords can manage their apartments easily with less effort.

Features.title: Payment
Features.text: Fast and easy to pay rent and added bills on a scheduled basis.

Features.title: Statistical Reports
Features.text: Track payments and get statistical results in form of charts.

Features.title: Tenant Management
Features.text: Manage Tenants in their apartments and get feedback from them.

Features.title: Confirmation Reciepts
Features.text: Get email and message confirmation reciepts for rent payment and additional bills.
